description: Expected self-hosted runner inventory for Tr3kkR/Yuzu. The runner-inventory-sentinel workflow asserts GitHub's reported actions/runners state matches this declaration and fails loud on drift. Update deliberately: every change is a single-purpose PR with clear intent. When the actual inventory changes (new runner, retirement, label change) this file MUST be updated in the same change, or the sentinel fires on the next cron tick (every 30 min).

expected_runners.name: yuzu-wsl2-linux
expected_runners.role: Linux CI jobs — ci.yml proto-compat, linux matrix, sanitizer-asan, sanitizer-tsan, coverage. Also CodeQL Linux leg and sanitizer-tests.yml dispatches. INCUMBENT 24.04 toolchain (gcc-13 / clang-19) — remains the live Linux runner until the Big Tam cutover. Cannot build the gcc-15 / clang-21 (26.04) toolchain.

expected_runners.name: yuzu-local-windows
expected_runners.role: Windows MSVC CI jobs — ci.yml windows matrix (release + debug), codeql Windows leg.

expected_runners.name: yuzu-bigtam-linux-0
expected_runners.role: Linux CI pool (shared label yuzu-bigtam-linux) — ci.yml proto-compat + linux matrix. Sanitizers, coverage, and the CodeQL Linux leg migrate here after the yuzu-shulgi pin cutover.
